top_events.event_id: mozilla says claude opus 4.6 found 100+ bugs in firefox in two weeks in january, 14 of them high-severity, more than the bugs typically reported in two months (robert mcmillan/wall street journal)
top_events.title: Mozilla says Claude Opus 4.6 found 100+ bugs in Firefox in two weeks in January, 14 of them high-severity, more than the bugs typically reported in two months (Robert McMillan/Wall Street Journal)
top_events.title_zh: Mozilla 表示，Claude Opus 4.6 在 1 月份的两周内在 Firefox 中发现了 100 多个错误，其中 14 个严重程度较高，比通常两个月内报告的错误还要多（Robert McMillan/华尔街日报）
top_events.title_bilingual: Mozilla 表示，Claude Opus 4.6 在 1 月份的两周内在 Firefox 中发现了 100 多个错误，其中 14 个严重程度较高，比通常两个月内报告的错误还要多（Robert McMillan/华尔街日报） / Mozilla says Claude Opus 4.6 found 100+ bugs in Firefox in two weeks in January, 14 of them high-severity, more than the bugs typically reported in two months (Robert McMillan/Wall Street Journal)
